Rule.name: Validate Access Request
Rule.Description: Validate the access request under manage user access module via Validate Access Request Plugin

Argument.name: log
Argument.Description: The log object associated with the SailPoint Context.

Argument.name: logger
Argument.Description: The log object associated with the Validate Access Request Plugin.

Argument.name: context
Argument.Description: A sailpoint.api.SailPointContext object that can be used to query the database if necessary.

Argument.name: requestor
Argument.Description: Identity that is making the Life Cycle Manager request.

Argument.name: selectedIdentities
addedItems
Argument.Description: Items added in the basket for addition. Below are the attributes: "addedItems": [{ "item": { "id": "c0a81d5487f91c908187fbd3e51d03e7", "accessType": "Entitlement", "displayableAccessType": "Entitlement", "type": "group", "displayableName": "DelimGrp-11", "owner": null, "description": "", "icon": "enterpriseIcon", "application": "Deimited-Auth", "attribute": "groups", "value": "DelimGrp-11", "classifications": [], "attributes": { "owner": null, "application.icon": "enterpriseIcon", "icon": "enterpriseIcon", "description": "", "type": "group", "accessType": "Entitlement", "classifications": [], "application": "Deimited-Auth", "displayableName": "DelimGrp-11", "displayableAccessType": "Entitlement", "attribute": "groups", "id": "c0a81d5487f91c908187fbd3e51d03e7", "owner.displayName": null, "value": "DelimGrp-11", "application.name": "Deimited-Auth", "attachments": [] } }, "permittedById": null, "accountSelections": null, "sunriseDate": null, "sunsetDate": null, "comment": null, "assignmentNote": null, "assignmentId": null, "approvalItemId": null } ]

Argument.name: removedItems
Argument.Description: Items added in the basket for the removal. Below are the attributes: "removedItems": [{ "item": { "id": "c0a81d5487a31e0c8187a345c50800b5", "accessType": "Entitlement", "displayableAccessType": "Entitlement", "type": "group", "displayableName": "DelimGrp-1", "owner": "IAM-Team", "description": "", "icon": "enterpriseIcon", "application": "Deimited-Auth", "attribute": "groups", "value": "DelimGrp-1", "classifications": [], "attributes": { "owner": "IAM-Team", "removePending": false, "application.icon": "enterpriseIcon", "accountName": "john", "icon": "enterpriseIcon", "description": "", "type": "group", "statusLabel": "Active", "nativeIdentity": "John", "accessType": "Entitlement", "classifications": [], "application": "Deimited-Auth", "removable": true, "displayableName": "DelimGrp-1", "displayableAccessType": "Entitlement", "attribute": "groups", "id": "c0a81d5487a31e0c8187a345c50800b5", "owner.displayName": "IAM-Team", "value": "DelimGrp-1", "application.name": "Deimited-Auth", "status": "active", "attachments": [] }, "status": "active", "statusLabel": "Active", "nativeIdentity": "John", "accountName": "john1", "removable": true, "removePending": false }, "comment": null, "sunsetDate": null }]
